data.title: Remove dead HouseBanner/HouseBannerGrid (superseded by per-page banner SVGs) + reconcile DESIGN.md

data.body: HouseBanner (pennant component) + HouseBannerGrid are dead: HouseBannerGrid is rendered nowhere in the app (commented out on Home via FRAC-161; only a test renders it), and HouseBanner's only renderer is HouseBannerGrid (variant=full used nowhere). They were superseded by the new per-page banner SVGs: VisitBannerSVG (Neighborhood), CampusBannerSVG (Campus), EducationBannerSVG (LiberalArts), EventsBannerSVG (Events), PublicationsBannerSVG (Lab). NO asset/preload changes: the banner .webp images + index.html preloads belong to the live octahedron (FACE_BANNER_IMAGES) and the *BannerSVG; HouseBanner only had a duplicate BANNER_IMAGES map. Scope: delete HouseBanner.tsx + HouseBannerGrid.tsx; remove the dead HouseBannerGrid test + Home.tsx dead comments; rewrite the DESIGN.md banner docs (the house-banner YAML component, the Components prose, the pennant-clip-path section) to reflect the live per-page *BannerSVG — WITHOUT touching the still-live house-page color floods / pairings / house tokens. Validates the user's original DESIGN.md review note.
